Amplify ETFs Completes Acquisition to Reach $9.1 Billion AUM Across 31 ETFs
Travel ETF offers exposure to fast-growing industry

holdings.infoBox: AWAY is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are Navan stock at 6.90%, Global Business Travel Group at 5.88%, eDreams ODIGEO at 5.30%, SiteMinder at 5.00%, and Tripadvisor at 4.36%.

overview.description: The Amplify Travel Tech ETF (AWAY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Prime Travel Technology index. The fund tracks an index of committee-selected travel technology companies from around the globe. Holdings are weighted based on market cap and liquidity. AWAY was launched on Feb 12, 2020 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
